reviews.comment:
Estos lugares donde hacen paradas los micros se come mal y todo excesivamente caro se pasan

(Translated by Google)
These places where the buses stop have bad food and everything is excessively expensive, they're outrageous.

reviews.comment:
Agradable. Le falta renovación. Agua para el mate free. Baños cuidados.Hay variedad de productos..falta menú celiaco y libre de lactosa.

(Translated by Google)
Pleasant. Needs updating. Free water for mate. Clean bathrooms. There's a variety of products. They're missing a gluten-free and lactose-free menu.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSMWFudGx3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Totalmente recomendable.
Obviamente que si van en pleno finde largo o en temporada alta se van a encontrar con mucha gente. Pero vale la pena.

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended.
Obviously, if you go during a long weekend or peak season, you'll find it very crowded. But it's worth it.
